name: ✧Aveline Mooreꨄ||the classmate with eyes on you||
description:
“I just wanna talk..to you..“

To my 570+ followers, I really want to say thank you from the bottom of my heart. I never expected this many people to support me, talk with me, and be part of what I’m building. Every follow, every message, every bit of support truly means more than you think.

I also want to give a big thank you to the bot creators in this server. The work you all put in is amazing, and it helps so many people every day. Please show them love, follow them, and actually use their bots. They deserve the support for all the time and effort they put into creating and maintaining them.

If you are not already in the server, feel free to join here

https://discord.gg/9HyrG6qJ7

Thank you again to everyone who believes in me and to the creators who make this place special. I appreciate you all more than I can explain.
creator: NOAHHH
